info.title: PolicyWell API
info.description: REST endpoints for PolicyWell insurance intelligence — policies, documents, analysis, recommendations, webhooks, and enterprise workflows. Status: planned contract for backend wiring.

bearerAuth.description: Use pw_test_... or pw_live_... API keys

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: API keys, scopes, and request authentication.

tags.name: Households
tags.description: Household context used by analysis and recommendations.

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: Upload and process policies, illustrations, and statements.

tags.name: Policies
tags.description: Structured policy records derived from documents and carrier data.

tags.name: Analyses
tags.description: Policy-health scoring, lapse risk, COI, and coverage-gap analysis.

tags.name: Recommendations
tags.description: Funding, coverage, rider, optimization, and exchange recommendations.

tags.name: Annuities
tags.description: FIA, MYGA, and SPIA comparison and income analysis.

tags.name: Organizations
tags.description: IMO/BGA workspaces, advisors, and book-of-business views.

tags.name: Carrier
tags.description: Carrier-facing ingestion, status, and servicing endpoints.

tags.name: Workflows
tags.description: Trigger analyses, notify advisors, and schedule reviews.

tags.name: Batch jobs
tags.description: Enterprise batch ingestion and analysis for carriers and IMOs.
